This catalog maps the GitHub Actions workspace surface inspired by OpenClaw workspace files and Hermes worktree separation: it exposes commands, layers, and gates while keeping file bodies, workflow bodies, issue/comment bodies, prompts, tool outputs, credentials, and workspace payloads out of the report.

### Catalog Entries
- command=`catalog` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /workspace catalog` local_command=`gitclaw workspace catalog` execution=`metadata-only` gate=`body-free-output` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`summary` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /workspace` local_command=`gitclaw workspace summary` execution=`metadata-only` gate=`body-free-workspace-envelope` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`verify` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /workspace verify` local_command=`gitclaw workspace verify` execution=`metadata-only` gate=`workspace-policy-spec-validation` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`risk` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /workspace risk` local_command=`gitclaw workspace risk` execution=`risk-audit` gate=`workspace-isolation` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`

### Workspace Layers
- layer=`policy` store=`.gitclaw/WORKSPACE.md` source=`repo-reviewed-workspace-policy` gate=`context-allowlist` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`specs` store=`.gitclaw/workspaces/*.md` source=`repo-reviewed-workspace-specs` gate=`reviewed-frontmatter` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`git` store=`.git` source=`checked-out-repository-metadata` gate=`read-only-metadata` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`workflow` store=`.github/workflows/*.yml` source=`GitHub Actions workflow metadata` gate=`checkout-and-setup-metadata` count=`7` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`context` store=`contextDocumentPaths` source=`repo-context-loader` gate=`bounded-context-allowlist` count=`15` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`repository-inventory` store=`git ls-files/listRepoFiles` source=`bounded-repository-inventory` gate=`bounded-file-list` count=`240` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`runtime` store=`GitHub Actions runner` source=`ephemeral-runner` gate=`ephemeral-runner-not-durable-memory` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`durable-state` store=`git tracked files + backup branch` source=`reviewed-repository-state` gate=`reviewed-files-and-post-turn-backups` count=`2` raw_bodies_included=`false`

### Catalog Gates
- workspace_validation_gate=`ok`
- workspace_policy_gate=`repo-reviewed-policy-file`
- workspace_spec_gate=`repo-reviewed-specs`
- checkout_gate=`actions-checkout-metadata`
- sandbox_gate=`workspace-is-not-sandbox`
- durability_gate=`git-tracked-files-and-backup-branch`
- mutation_gate=`disabled`
- raw_body_gate=`hashes-counts-and-metadata-only`
- model_e2e_gate=`required`
